title: Test updating c/image and GitHub.com/proglottis/gpgme
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

GitHub.com/proglottis/gpgme now uses pkg-config to find gpgme. That’s cleaner than the previous method, but test that Buildah builds with that, just to avoid surprises (and this PR should fix them if there turn out to be any.)

#### How to verify it

Existing tests

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Builds with GPGME now require GPGME ≥ 1.13.0.
```

You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @tomsweeneyredhat` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Tests passed with no modifications needed, closing. This will get into Buildah naturally with a future re-vendoring.
